name: Categorize and prioritize tasks by urgency and impact
prompt: Read tasks.json which contains 12 tasks, each with a name, deadline, effort level (low/medium/high), impact level (low/medium/high), and category. Today's date is 2026-03-16. Produce priority_report.json with: (1) must_do_today: array of task names that have deadline=today AND impact=high, (2) should_do: array of task names for tasks that are important but not critically urgent today, (3) nice_to_have: array of task names for lower-priority tasks, (4) deferred: array of task names that can wait — tasks with deadline far in the future and low impact, (5) reasoning: an object mapping each task name to a one-line string explaining why it was placed in its category. Every one of the 12 tasks must appear in exactly one of the four arrays.

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
